chapter_title.en: Chapter 80 – The Bartering regarding the foodstuff

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/198)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/198)
text: كَرِهَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَفِيزَ لَوْزٍ بِقَفِيزَيْنِ مِنْ لَوْزٍ وَ قَفِيزَ تَمْرٍ بِقَفِيزَيْنِ مِنْ تَمْرٍ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin ziyad and Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub from Khalid Bin Jareer, from Abu Al Rabie Al Shamy who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> disliked (bartering) one Qafeez (a unit of measurement) of almonds with two Qafeez of almonds, and one Qafeez of dates with two Qafeez of dates’.
en.sarwar: 13. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad and Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Mahbub from Khalid ibn Jarir from abu al-Rabi‘ al-Shamiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, disliked exchange of one Qafiz of almond with two Qafiz of almond and one Qafiz of dates with two Qafiz of dates.’”
